name: Toxic Seal
description: At the end of the User's Turn they are inflicted with the Badly Poisoned Status Condition, this ignores Type Immunities. If they lose this item, the Badly Poisoned Status Condition fades. As long as they are holding this item, they may cleare the Badly Poison Buildup as a Bonus Action instead of a Main Action on their turn, in addition they gain +1 Base Dexterity.
